title: pyrus lemoinei
intro: Pyrus lemoinei, also known as the Chinese pear or Lemoine pear, is a species of pear tree native to China. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus lemoinei include reducing fever, relieving sore throats, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pyrus lemoinei is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts can also be used in herbal preparations like tea, tinctures, and capsules.
